title: External Evidence Registry
description: Human attestations for non-code artifacts. Each entry records who verified what, when, and links to evidence.

checkpoint_id.description: ID of the external or hybrid checkpoint

attested_by.description: Identity of the person who verified this

evidence_link.description: URL to dashboard, registration, document, or screenshot

expires.description: When this attestation should be re-verified. Default: 90 days from attested_date.
